creator: franco@opnsense.org
text:
Hi Jochen,

What's the status here?  Do you need anything from me?

BTW, I also have a Phalcon 4 port ready for their Alpha release:

https://github.com/opnsense/ports/tree/master/opnsense/phalcon4

Since this version is not going to be backwards-comaptible should the port be named "phalcon4" in anticipation of the release or rather go with phalcon-devel and deal with the name / renaming of phalcon(3) later?


Cheers,
Franco
